subcodes.first_line: O Shaykh! Hearken to the spiritual call from the divine Lote-Tree in the Persian tongue, that thou mayest be quickened by the melodious voice of the All-Merciful [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای شیخ ندای معنوی را از سدره ربانی بلسان پارسی بشنو تا از ندای خوش رحمان جان
subcodes.subjects: @suffering and imprisonment, @mystical themes, @spiritual transformation, @teaching the Cause; call to teach, @service to others; to the Cause of God, @spiritual emotions and susceptibilities, @blind imitation [taqlid]
